description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Emergency gun-hunting drill conducted in preparation for bear and other wildlife encounters.

「Mirror Rock on Tenranzan」and「Gorge Formation in Shirotani Gorge」have been designated as cultural properties.

Lighting-equipped truck-shaped crime prevention buzzers have been donated to Hanno City by the Saitama Truck Association.

Daito Kentaku Co., Ltd. donated funds through the corporate hometown tax program.

Hanno City and Fuji Yakuhin Co., Ltd. concluded a comprehensive partnership agreement.

Panda-shaped pencils have been donated to Hanno City by Kaneko Gumi Co., Ltd.

Reiwa 7 fiscal year recipients of fire department and community activity commendations have been decided.

Cross-traffic flags and traffic safety umbrellas have been donated to Hanno City by Iruma Nō Agricultural Cooperative.

Hanno City and Nippon Life Insurance Mutual Company Kawagoe Branch concluded a comprehensive partnership agreement.

Emergency fiscal measures were announced.

Double issuance of ballots occurred in the 51st House of Councillors election.

The 51st House of Councillors election and the 27th Supreme Court Justice national referendum were held on January 23, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

Daiichi Life Insurance Company donated funds through the corporate hometown tax program.

A briefing session on emergency fiscal measures was held.

Reiwa 7 fiscal year wildlife damage prevention training session was conducted.

The 12th Hanno City Emergency Economic Measures package was announced.

Nippon Life Insurance Mutual Company donated funds through the corporate hometown tax program.

Market sounding survey for privatization accompanying rebuilding of Sengen Nursery will be conducted.

Museum PR video will be produced through collaboration with Surugadai University Media Information Department Takada Seminar.

Unauthorized receipt of childcare and education facility benefits and administrative penalties were implemented.

Revised Administrative Operations Review Checklist (Phase 2) was released.

Special Exhibition 「Rare Amulets – Old and Unusual Items on Display」was held.

Reappointment of Vice Mayor and Superintendent of Education was decided.

28th Hanno City Elementary and Junior High School Social Studies Research Exhibition award winners were decided.

Collection shortfalls in late-stage medical insurance premiums were found.

Ceremony for presentation of「Nishikawa timber blocks」to newborns was held.

New Hanno City Mayor took office.

Demonstration project for conservation of natural and living environment through expanded occupancy zones around Hanno Riverbed will be conducted.

Bus route wrapped with fire department recruitment messaging will operate.

Presentation of「Nishikawa timber blocks」to newborns began.

Donation received from Koyo-sha Co., Ltd.

Hanno City Council vice-chairpersons and chairperson took office.

Appointment ceremony for Hanno City PR ambassadors was held.

Donation presentation ceremony from Hanno Rotary Club to Hanno City was held.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025/11596.html
